title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 67.1249 - Grants may be awarded by board to conduct research
text:
67.1249.  Grants may be awarded by board to conduct research. — The board of supervisors may award grants to any person, firm, corporation, institution or association to conduct research projects on agricultural commodities for the agricultural commodity research district.
(L. 1993 S.B. 84 § 10)
